mapper.sql: SELECT e.equipment_id AS id, 'CAM' || LPAD(e.equipment_id::text, 2, '0') AS name, COALESCE(e.risk_level, 'LOW') AS risk_level, CASE WHEN e.risk_level = 'CRITICAL' THEN LEAST(3, GREATEST(0, 300 - (CURRENT_DATE - e.installation_date))) ELSE GREATEST(0, 300 - (CURRENT_DATE - e.installation_date)) END::int AS rul, COALESCE(e.status, '정상가동') AS status, COALESCE(s.motor_current, 0) AS motor_current, COALESCE(s.vibration, 0) AS vibration, COALESCE(s.temperature, 0) AS temperature, COALESCE(s.anomaly_score, 0) AS risk_score, TO_CHAR(m.last_resolved, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS last_inspection, TO_CHAR(e.installation_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS install_date FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT motor_current, vibration, temperature, anomaly_score FROM sensor_log WHERE equipment_id = e.equipment_id ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) s ON TRUE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT equipment_id, MAX(resolved_at) AS last_resolved FROM maintenance_log WHERE repair_status = '완료' GROUP BY equipment_id ) m ON m.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
